products.name: PRS-M4S – Drone Parachute Recovery System for DJI Matrice 4 Series
products.descriptor: ASTM F3322-compliant parachute recovery system for DJI Matrice 4 Enterprise and Thermal

evidence.snippet: **(Canada)** – [AVSS – Aerial Vehicle Safety Solutions Inc.](https://avss.co/) (AVSS) is pleased to announce the launch of the PRS-M4S, a Parachute Recovery System for the new DJI Matrice 4 Series. Compatible with the DJI Matrice 4 Enterprise and DJI Matrice 4 Thermal.

products.name: PRS-M30 – Drone Parachute Recovery System for DJI M30 Series

evidence.snippet: PRS-M30 for DJI M30T and DJI M30. Drone parachute for DJI.
AVSS is now taking new orders for their PRS-M30, which will be delivered to customers throughout Q2, 2025.

products.name: Guided Delivery Systems (Air Drops / Micro-JPADS)
products.descriptor: Autonomously guided and unguided resupply hardware for last-mile air delivery from crewed and autonomous aircraft

evidence.snippet:
Delivery Systems
----------------
### When Landing Is Not An Option
In 2020, AVSS began to expand its product offerings with guided and unguided delivery systems for dual-use customers. These new products have been sold to commercial and government clients.

products.name: Snow Darts™
products.descriptor: Drone-deployed projectiles for avalanche management and mitigation

evidence.snippet: AVSS’s delivery systems include autonomously guided resupply hardware that is deployed from autonomous and crewed aircraft, unguided parachutes for low-altitude delivery, and Snow Darts™ for a safer and lower-cost avalanche management solution with drones. The delivery systems are powered by AVSS’s ground control software, which allows users to preplan and automate missions.
